title: Colored Enchantment Names
description: Each item type has a color — Armor / Weapon / Trident
body:
Changes the color of enchantment name in the tooltip based on the type of item it can be applied to. So, all sword enchantments are red, while all armor enchantments are green!

![Loyalty III, Enchanted Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ad653ad29627d2ac9d107ab1bd432370b038e62.jpeg)
